# Joseph V. Hoffer — Criminal Defense Attorney, Cleveland, Tennessee

> Joe Hoffer is a criminal defense attorney practicing in Bradley County, Polk County,
> the Ocoee region, and the Eastern District of Tennessee federal courts. He has nearly
> four decades of experience as both a state and federal prosecutor and as a criminal
> defense attorney. He practices as Hoffer Defense, Of Counsel to RMR Legal PLLC,
> at 70 North Ocoee Street, Cleveland, Tennessee 37311. Phone: (423) 463-0360.
> Fully bilingual in English and Spanish. No interpreter required.

## Practice Areas

- [Criminal Defense — Bradley & Polk County](https://www.hofferdefense.com): State criminal defense across all offense classes including felony, misdemeanor, DUI, drug offenses, weapons charges, and juvenile matters in Bradley County and Polk County courts.
- [Eastern District Federal Defense](https://www.hofferdefense.com): Federal criminal defense in the U.S. District Court for the Eastern District of Tennessee, including drug trafficking, firearms, fraud, and other federal offenses.
- [Search & Seizure / Fourth Amendment](https://www.hofferdefense.com): Recognized authority on unlawful searches, warrant defects, and constitutional violations under Tennessee and federal law.
- [Cryptocurrency & Digital Evidence](https://www.hofferdefense.com): One of Tennessee's foremost authorities on blockchain evidence and digital asset crimes. CLE instructor for Tennessee law enforcement professionals.
- [Juvenile Criminal Defense](https://www.hofferdefense.com): Defense of juveniles in Tennessee juvenile courts with prosecution and defense experience on both sides.
- [Spanish-Language Criminal Defense](https://www.hofferdefense.com): Full criminal defense representation in Spanish — Bradley County, Polk County, and the Ocoee region. No interpreter needed.

## Attorney Biography

- [Full Biography](https://www.hofferdefense.com): Joseph V. Hoffer — nearly four decades of criminal law experience spanning the Cuyahoga County Prosecutor's Office (1989–1997), the U.S. Attorney's Office for the District of Puerto Rico (1996–1998), and two tenures as Assistant District Attorney General for Tennessee's Tenth Judicial District (1998–2004; 2015–2026), before transitioning to private criminal defense as Hoffer Defense, Of Counsel to RMR Legal PLLC. Federal Indigent Panel attorney 2005–2015.

## Blog — The Defense Brief

- [Tennessee's New Defense of Property Law](https://joehofferattorney.substack.com/p/tennessees-new-defense-of-property): Analysis of what Tennessee's 2026 property defense legislation actually authorizes — and what misunderstandings about it could result in felony charges.
- [Sixth Circuit AI Sanctions Opinion](https://joehoffer.substack.com/p/the-sixth-circuit-just-handed-down): What the Van Irion sanctions opinion means for attorneys using AI tools and why LLMs are not legal research databases.
- [AI and the Private Attorney](https://joehoffer.substack.com/p/ai-and-the-private-attorney): Data privacy and confidentiality considerations for small firm criminal defense attorneys using AI tools.
- [What to Do After an Arrest or Search Warrant](https://joehoffer.substack.com/p/what-to-do-after-arrest-or-a-search): Plain-language guidance on constitutional rights during law enforcement contact in Tennessee.
